Log:
  www/qutebrowser: set WEBENGINE by default on powerpc64 elfv2

  FreeBSD 13 soon switches to elfv2 abi on powerpc64, which has webengine available.

  PR:		242429
  Approved by:	novel (maintainer), mentors (implicit approval)
